Detect unused code in .NET solutions

Usage:
  dotnet-unused [path] [options]

Arguments:
  path               Path to .sln or .csproj file

Options:
  --format, -f       Output format: text or json (default: text)
  --output, -o       Output file path (only for JSON format)
  --exclude-public   Exclude public members (default: true)
  --skip-usings      Skip unused using directives analysis (default: false)
  --fix              Automatically remove unused usings (default: false)
  --unused-packages  Detect unused NuGet packages (default: false)
  --help, -h         Show help information

Examples:
  dotnet-unused MySolution.sln
  dotnet-unused MyProject.csproj --format json --output report.json
  dotnet-unused MySolution.sln --exclude-public false
  dotnet-unused MySolution.sln --skip-usings
  dotnet-unused MySolution.sln --fix
  dotnet-unused MySolution.sln --unused-packages
